subcodes.first_line: O faithful friend! It is said that ere long shall the world's dignitaries adorn the firmament and establish the celebration of universal peace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یار وفادارا گویند عنقریب رجال جهان کیهان بیارایند و جشن صلح عمومی برپا نمایند
subcodes.subjects: @war and peace, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @unity of governments; political unity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
